message:
refactor(io_uring): use unit struct instantiation instead of default()

Replace `IoUringReactor::default()` with direct `IoUringReactor` unit
struct instantiation in tests. This is the idiomatic Rust pattern for
unit structs (structs with no fields) - calling default() on them is
redundant since there's nothing to default.

Changed in 3 test functions:
- test_register_modify_deregister_unsupported
- test_poll_and_wake_unsupported
- test_registration_count_zero

This improves code clarity and follows Rust conventions where unit
structs should be instantiated directly rather than through Default
trait implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
